task_completion.description: Fetch the bovine trypsin structure (PDB: 2PTN) into PyMOL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyMOL window is open with a protein structure visible, and '2PTN' is listed in the right-hand object/selection panel.

task_completion.description: Identify and visualize the catalytic triad residues (Ser195, His57, Asp102).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The three specific residues (Ser195, His57, Asp102) are shown in a distinct representation, such as 'sticks', while the rest of the protein is likely in a 'cartoon' or 'ribbon' representation. They should be colored distinctly to stand out.

task_completion.description: Measure the key hydrogen bond distances between the triad residues.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dashed lines representing distance measurements are visible between the triad residues in the PyMOL viewer. There should be at least two measurements shown with labels indicating distances around 2.7 to 2.8 Angstroms.

task_completion.description: Render and save a high-quality PNG figure to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or image viewer shows the file 'trypsin_triad.png' successfully created in the directory '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/'.

task_completion.description: Write a plain-text report containing the triad identifications, measured distances, and a note on the catalytic mechanism.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output (e.g., using 'cat') displays the contents of '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/trypsin_triad_report.txt'. The text must include the residues (Ser195, His57, Asp102), two distance measurements (between 2.0 and 4.5), and a mention of the charge-relay mechanism.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used PyMOL to generate the visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PyMOL interface (GUI or command line) being actively used to manipulate the structure, rather than the agent downloading a pre-made image of the trypsin triad from a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the distance measurements are native PyMOL objects.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance labels in the PyMOL viewer should appear as standard PyMOL measurement objects (yellow dashed lines with numerical labels), not text manually overlaid using an external image editor.

integrity.description: Verify the report contains actual findings rather than just prompt text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text report should contain specific distance values that match the measurements seen in the PyMOL viewer screenshots, rather than generic placeholders or exact copy-pastes of the prompt instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: PDB ID: 2PTN. Catalytic triad residues: His57, Asp102, Ser195. Expected hydrogen bond distances are between 2.0 and 4.5 Å (specifically ~2.7 and ~2.8 Å). The figure must be saved to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/trypsin_triad.png' (minimum 30,000 bytes). The report must be saved to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/trypsin_triad_report.txt' and contain at least 5 lines and 100 characters.
